title: Finn and the Safari Friends
synopsis: Little Finn explores the African savanna and meets gentle animals like elephants, giraffes, and lions. Each animal teaches him something special about friendship and nature in this warm, colorful adventure perfect for toddlers.

pages.text: Little Finn walks in the warm savanna. The golden grass tickles his legs.

illustration.description: A young boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes walking through tall golden savanna grass under an orange sunset sky, painted in gouache with thick brushstrokes and warm colors
illustration.alt: Finn walking through golden savanna grass

pages.text: A big gray elephant waves her trunk. 'Hello, Finn!' she trumpets happily.

illustration.description: A friendly gray elephant with expressive eyes waving her trunk at a boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes, painted in thick gouache brushstrokes with warm savanna colors
illustration.alt: Elephant greeting Finn with her trunk

pages.text: A tall giraffe bends down low. Her spots are like polka dots. She gives Finn a gentle kiss.

illustration.description: A spotted giraffe bending her long neck down to nuzzle a small boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes, painted with bold confident gouache strokes in warm orange and golden tones
illustration.alt: Giraffe giving Finn a gentle kiss

pages.text: A lion family rests under a big tree. The daddy lion has a fluffy mane. The cubs play and tumble.

illustration.description: A lion family lounging under an acacia tree while a boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes watches nearby, painted in textured gouache with warm savanna colors and an orange sunset backdrop
illustration.alt: Lion family resting under a tree with Finn watching

pages.text: The sun sets orange and red. All the animals say goodnight. Finn waves goodbye to his new friends.

illustration.description: A boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes waving goodbye to various safari animals silhouetted against a brilliant orange sunset, painted in bold gouache brushstrokes with warm glowing colors
illustration.alt: Finn waving goodbye to safari animals at sunset

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: What color is the elephant?
questions.explanation: The elephant is gray, just like real elephants!

questions.question: What does the giraffe have on her body?
questions.explanation: The giraffe has spots that look like polka dots!

questions.question: When do the animals say goodnight?
questions.explanation: The animals say goodnight when the sun sets orange and red!
